681.reason: [BType only includes 'int' and 'char', so CONSTTK should not be here. Including CONSTTK causes incorrect parsing when a const declaration is encountered, as const declarations are handled by parseConstDecl(), not parseVarDecl().]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [BType only includes 'int' and 'char', so CONSTTK should not be here. Including CONSTTK causes incorrect parsing when a const declaration is encountered, as const declarations are handled by parseConstDecl(), not parseVarDecl().]
